summary: Iteration 55 - Communications API & Travel Analytics Dashboard Backend Testing. All 26 tests PASSED. Verified: 1) POST /api/communications/announcements creates announcements with service_type filtering. 2) POST /api/communications/alerts creates alerts with severity. 3) PUT /api/communications/alerts/{id}/resolve marks alerts as resolved. 4) GET /api/communications/recent returns combined feed with comm_type labels. 5) GET /api/travel/analytics/dashboard returns real data (monthly_trend, route_popularity, vehicle_utilization, summary). 6) Different service_types (travel, hotels, restaurants) all work correctly. FIXED: Bug in get_recent_communications endpoint - datetime comparison error when sorting items with mixed timezone-aware/naive dates.

communications_alerts_tests.test_09_get_travel_alerts_filtered: PASS - service_type filter works for alerts
communications_alerts_tests.test_10_get_active_alerts_only: PASS - status=active filter returns only active alerts
communications_alerts_tests.test_12_resolved_alert_not_in_active: PASS - Resolved alerts excluded from active filter

communications_recent_feed_tests.test_13_get_recent_travel_communications: PASS - Combined feed returns items with comm_type labels
communications_recent_feed_tests.test_14_recent_feed_for_hotels: PASS - Recent feed works for hotels service
communications_recent_feed_tests.test_15_recent_feed_for_restaurants: PASS - Recent feed works for restaurants service

travel_analytics_tests.test_20_analytics_summary_structure: PASS - Has total_bookings, total_revenue, active_routes, active_vehicles
travel_analytics_tests.test_21_analytics_data_from_real_db: PASS - Data consistent between requests (from real DB)

operator_scoped_tests.test_25_operator_views_recent_feed: PASS - Operator can view recent feed

cleanup.test_99_cleanup_test_data: PASS - Test data prefixed with TEST_ for identification

features_verified.create_announcement_with_service_type: VERIFIED - POST /api/communications/announcements creates with title, message, service_type
features_verified.create_alert_with_severity: VERIFIED - POST /api/communications/alerts creates with title, message, service_type, severity
features_verified.recent_feed_combined: VERIFIED - GET /api/communications/recent returns combined feed with comm_type labels (notification/announcement/alert)
features_verified.travel_analytics_monthly_trend: VERIFIED - Last 6 months with bookings and revenue from orders collection
features_verified.travel_analytics_route_popularity: VERIFIED - Top routes with booking counts from orders collection
features_verified.travel_analytics_vehicle_utilization: VERIFIED - Vehicle utilization percentages from seat_bookings collection
features_verified.travel_analytics_summary: VERIFIED - Real totals from DB: total_bookings, total_revenue, active_routes, active_vehicles
features_verified.multi_service_type_support: VERIFIED - Works for travel, hotels, restaurants service types

datetime_comparison_error.issue: TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes when sorting combined feed
datetime_comparison_error.fix: Added get_sort_date helper function that converts datetime to timestamp for consistent comparison

critical_code_review_comments: Communications API correctly stores data in service_announcements and service_alerts collections with service_type field for filtering
Travel analytics endpoint correctly aggregates from orders, travel_routes, vehicles, and seat_bookings collections
All endpoints properly handle operator_id filtering for multi-tenant support
seed_data_creation: Test announcements and alerts created with TEST_ prefix in service_announcements and service_alerts collections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 verified Communications API and Travel Analytics Dashboard. Key endpoints: 1) POST/GET /api/communications/announcements with service_type filtering. 2) POST/GET /api/communications/alerts with severity and resolve functionality. 3) GET /api/communications/recent returns combined feed with comm_type labels. 4) GET /api/travel/analytics/dashboard returns real analytics from orders/routes/vehicles/seat_bookings. Fixed datetime sorting bug in recent feed endpoint. All communications stored in service_announcements and service_alerts MongoDB collections.
